hero.subtitle: ANALYTICS DASHBOARD
hero.title: Powerful Analytics for Data-Driven Decisions
hero.description: Get real-time insights into your business performance with our AI-powered analytics dashboard. Track, analyze, and optimize your metrics in one place.

items.title: Real-Time Insights
items.description: Monitor your key metrics in real-time with live data updates and instant notifications.

items.title: AI-Powered Analysis
items.description: Let AI uncover hidden patterns and provide actionable recommendations.

items.title: Performance Tracking
items.description: Track all your KPIs and business metrics in one centralized dashboard.

items.title: Custom Reports
items.description: Create customized reports and visualizations tailored to your needs.

features.title: Comprehensive Analytics Features
features.description: Everything you need to understand and optimize your business performance.

items.title: Interactive Dashboards
items.description: Create custom dashboards with drag-and-drop widgets and real-time data

items.title: Advanced Analytics
items.description: Leverage AI and machine learning for deeper insights

items.title: Automated Reporting
items.description: Save time with automated report generation and scheduling

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Get started with analytics in four simple steps

steps.title: Connect Data Sources

steps.title: Configure Dashboard
steps.description: Set up your custom dashboards and metrics

steps.title: Optimize & Improve

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.description: Choose the plan that best fits your analytics needs

items.content: The analytics dashboard has transformed how we make decisions. The real-time insights and AI-powered recommendations have helped us increase our efficiency by 40%.
items.author: Alex Rivera

items.content: Having all our metrics in one place with automated reporting has saved us countless hours. The customization options are exactly what we needed.
items.author: Sarah Kim

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Analytics?
cta.description: Join thousands of businesses using our analytics dashboard to make better decisions.
